closure_text: Nonconformance closed after rework of 39 units; effectiveness check scheduled next cycle.
Material lot quarantined pending CoA review; disposition set to use-as-is after engineering waiver.
Investigation found an out-of-spec torque setting; work instruction WI-983 updated accordingly.
Handling damage identified at packaging; foam insert redesigned and first-article re-approved.
Sampling error under AQL plan corrected; inspector re-qualified on the revised sampling table.
Nonconformance closed after rework of 6 units; effectiveness check scheduled next cycle.
Root cause traced to a mislabeled fixture on line 6; operator retrained and check sheet revised.
